Title: Register a New User
Preconditions: No existing user with the same username or email.
Test Data: Username: newUser, Password: newPass, Name: John Doe, Email: john@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User invokes registerUser().
2. Main invokes getValidData() on Users Database.
3. Users Database verifies valid data and returns true.
4. Main invokes saveUserData() on Users Database.
5. Users Database saves user data and returns success message.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully with the provided details.

Title: Register a User with Invalid Data
Preconditions: No existing user with the same username or email.
Test Data: Username: newUser, Password: short, Name: John Doe, Email: invalid-email
Test Steps:
1. User invokes registerUser().
2. Main invokes getValidData() on Users Database.
3. Users Database verifies valid data and returns false.
4. Users Database returns error message.
Expected Result: User registration fails due to invalid data.

Title: Log In with Valid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. User invokes login(email, password).
2. Main invokes validateUser(email, password) on Users Database.
3. Users Database validates user credentials and returns true.
4. Main confirms successful login.
Expected Result: User logs in successfully.

Title: Log In with Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. User invokes login(email, password).
2. Main invokes validateUser(email, password) on Users Database.
3. Users Database validates user credentials and returns false.
4. Main confirms failed login.
Expected Result: User login fails due to incorrect password.

Title: Create a New Trip
Test Data: City: Paris, Country: France, BeginningDate: 2023-10-01, FinishDate: 2023-10-07, Author: User
Test Steps:
1. User sets city name to Paris.
2. User sets country name to France.
3. User sets beginning date to 2023-10-01.
4. User sets finish date to 2023-10-07.
5. User sets author to themselves.
Expected Result: Trip is created successfully with specified details.

Title: Add a Place to Visit to a Trip
Test Data: Name: Eiffel Tower, Category: Landmark, IdTrip: 1
Test Steps:
1. User adds a place to visit named Eiffel Tower.
2. User assigns category Landmark to the place.
3. User associates the place with trip Id 1.
Expected Result: Place to visit is added successfully to the trip.

Title: Update Trip Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a trip.
Test Steps:
1. User invokes updateTrip().
2. Main retrieves new data from the user.
3. Main updates trip data in the Trips Database.
4. Main sends updated data back to the user.
Expected Result: Trip data is updated successfully with new city and finish date.

Title: Assign a Category to a Place to Visit
Test Steps:
1. User sets category name to Museum.
2. User sets icon to museum_icon.png.
Expected Result: Category is assigned successfully to the place to visit.

Title: Create a Daily Plan for a Trip
Test Steps:
1. User creates a daily plan with plan id 1.
2. User sets day to 2023-10-02.
3. User associates weather condition Sunny with the daily plan.
Expected Result: Daily plan is created successfully with specified details.

Title: Retrieve Weather Information for a Daily Plan
Test Steps:
1. User retrieves weather information for the daily plan.
2. System returns weather details including high temperature, low temperature, and icon.
Expected Result: Weather information is retrieved successfully.

Title: Change Profile Information
Test Data: New Name: Jane Doe, New Email: jane@example.com
Test Steps:
1. User initiates change profile process by invoking changeProfile().
2. Main verifies user's data with the database.
3. Main retrieves new data from the user.
4. Main updates user's data in the database.
Expected Result: User's profile is updated successfully with new name and email.

Title: Change Profile with Invalid Data
Test Steps:
1. User initiates change profile process by invoking changeProfile().
2. Main verifies user's data with the database and finds invalid email format.
3. Main prompts user to enter valid data.
Expected Result: Profile update fails due to invalid email format. User is prompted to provide valid data.

Title: Delete a User Account
Test Steps:
1. User initiates account deletion process.
2. Main verifies user's data with the database.
3. Main deletes user's data from the database.
Expected Result: User account is deleted successfully.

Title: Attempt to Log In After Deleting Account
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to log in with deleted account credentials.
2. Main invokes validateUser(email, password) on Users Database.
3. Users Database returns false as user does not exist.
Expected Result: User login fails due to non-existent account.

Title: Add Multiple Places to Visit to a Trip
Test Data: Place 1: Louvre, Category: Museum, Place 2: Notre Dame, Category: Church
Test Steps:
1. User adds Louvre as a place to visit with category Museum.
2. User adds Notre Dame as a place to visit with category Church.
Expected Result: Both places to visit are added successfully to the trip.

Title: Add a Daily Plan with Invalid Weather Information
Test Steps:
1. User creates a daily plan with plan id 1.
2. User sets day to 2023-10-02.
3. User attempts to associate invalid weather condition with the daily plan.
4. System rejects invalid weather condition.
Expected Result: Daily plan creation fails due to invalid weather information. User is prompted to provide valid weather details.

Title: Change Profile with Existing Email
Test Steps:
1. User initiates change profile process by invoking changeProfile().
2. Main verifies user's data with the database and finds duplicate email.
3. Main prompts user to enter unique email.
Expected Result: Profile update fails due to duplicate email. User is prompted to provide unique email.

Title: Add a Daily Plan with Duplicate ID
Test Steps:
1. User creates a daily plan with plan id 1.
2. User sets day to 2023-10-02.
3. User associates weather condition Sunny with the daily plan.
4. System detects duplicate plan id.
Expected Result: Daily plan creation fails due to duplicate plan id. User is prompted to provide unique plan id.

Title: Change Profile with Existing Username
Test Steps:
1. User initiates change profile process by invoking changeProfile().
2. Main verifies user's data with the database and finds duplicate username.
3. Main prompts user to enter unique username.
Expected Result: Profile update fails due to duplicate username. User is prompted to provide unique username.

Title: Add a Place to Visit with Invalid Category
Test Data: Name: Eiffel Tower, Category: Invalid, IdTrip: 1
Test Steps:
1. User adds a place to visit named Eiffel Tower.
2. User attempts to assign invalid category to the place.
3. System rejects invalid category.
Expected Result: Place to visit addition fails due to invalid category. User is prompted to provide valid category.

Title: Add a Daily Plan with Invalid Day Format
Test Steps:
1. User creates a daily plan with plan id 1.
2. User sets day to 2023-10-02T12:00:00Z.
3. System detects invalid day format.
Expected Result: Daily plan creation fails due to invalid day format. User is prompted to provide valid day format.
